name: ︶꒷꒦︶ | Miguel
description:
A Halloween special! Venom x Miguel

𝖯𝖺𝗋𝗍 𝗈𝖿 𝗍𝗁𝖾 🩸 🍊 #𝖡𝗅𝗈𝗈𝖽𝖮𝗋𝖺𝗇𝗀𝖾𝗌 𝖲𝖾𝗋𝗂𝖾𝗌 ( 𝖣𝖾𝖺𝖽 𝖣𝗈𝗏𝖾 ).

Miguel has feelings for user, but he won't admit it. Venom on the other hand, will definitely exploit that. And will, of course, feed on delicious fluids and endorphins in the process. A man, er—a symbiote, has gotta eat, am I right?

Happy Halloween you filthy degenerates~

TWs for dubcon, somno, etc. ( you know me, you know what you're getting into at this rate ).
DMs are open for bot suggestions, comments / concerns and issues!

♡ @elluxia.

art cred @GrozellArt on twitter.
creator: Elluxia
